name: Pound Cake, Famous Peach
recipeIngredient: 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted after measuring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Lightly grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan and set aside.
3. In the bowl of an electric mixer on medium speed, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. In a separate smaller bowl, combine sifted flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
5. Combine sour cream and chopped peaches in another small bowl.
6. Fold the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture alternately with sour cream and peaches, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Stir in vanilla and almond extracts if desired.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake on the middle oven rack for 65-75 minutes or until cake tests done. It should just release from the edge of the pan, be golden brown, and spring back when lightly touched.
8. Let cake cool in pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a rack to finish cooling.
